---
title: "Events"
subtitle: "Seminars, workshops, and lab activities"
toc: false
---

::: {.section-header}
## Upcoming

[Current and future events]{.subtitle}
:::

<!-- Add upcoming events here. Newest dates at the top.
     Copy one block per event:

::: {.publication}
[Event name]{.pub-title}

[Day Month Year · HH:MM WIB]{.pub-meta}
:::

When an event has passed, move its block down to the Past section below. -->

::: {.publication}
[Example: DEN Economics Lab seminar]{.pub-title}

[1 July 2026 · 14:00 WIB]{.pub-meta}
:::

::: {.section-header}
## Past

[Previous events]{.subtitle}
:::

<!-- Move finished events here (most recent first). -->
</content>
